channel.title: morganjay TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from morganjay

item.title: Tomorrow is Valentine’s Day. You know that stupid made up day that everybody uses to make money it’s a good laid. Anyway, make sure to lay it on thick tomorrow. Flowers, chocolates, the whole 9 yards. Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morganjay dot c
item.description: Tomorrow is Valentine’s Day. You know that stupid made up day that everybody uses to make money it’s a good laid. Anyway, make sure to lay it on thick tomorrow. Flowers, chocolates, the whole 9 yards. Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morganjay dot c
item.author: morganjay

item.title: This was filmed Amsterdam back in June. Would you be my dad? Is one of my favourite songs to do? Shut up all the dads? I’ve met over the years and shout out to the two dads in this video. Amsterdam is an interesting place. But I love it. Tour dates below.
item.description: This was filmed Amsterdam back in June. Would you be my dad? Is one of my favourite songs to do? Shut up all the dads? I’ve met over the years and shout out to the two dads in this video. Amsterdam is an interesting place. But I love it. Tour dates below.
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Big announcement tomorrow for Los Angeles. This was filmed in Norway and this guy I couldn’t help but then looked a little like Bo Burhnam to everybody who came to the Shows and a shout out to everybody who likes to get freaky with me. Merch at goofygang
item.description: Big announcement tomorrow for Los Angeles. This was filmed in Norway and this guy I couldn’t help but then looked a little like Bo Burhnam to everybody who came to the Shows and a shout out to everybody who likes to get freaky with me. Merch at goofygang
item.author: morganjay

item.title: I told you there was gonna be a big announcement for Los Angeles. This is gonna be one of the coolest shows I ever do! This is a home game. Because I live in Los Angeles and I love it here. Pre-sale tickets go live tomorrow/Wednesday at 10 am and the code
item.description: I told you there was gonna be a big announcement for Los Angeles. This is gonna be one of the coolest shows I ever do! This is a home game. Because I live in Los Angeles and I love it here. Pre-sale tickets go live tomorrow/Wednesday at 10 am and the code
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Filmed in Amsterdam back in May I found this couple and they were so cute and this guy really lit it up and this is one of the first times. I really did this at a show and now it has become a staple of the show in a favourite and we have to do it all the
item.description: Filmed in Amsterdam back in May I found this couple and they were so cute and this guy really lit it up and this is one of the first times. I really did this at a show and now it has become a staple of the show in a favourite and we have to do it all the
item.author: morganjay

item.title: This was filmed in Amsterdam 🥵🫦 back in May of last year. Why are the Dutch like this? I’m gonna be honest with you, 👄🐐 Amsterdamn is one of my most favourite cities but they were my least favourite crowds but I learned that Dutch people are just very str
item.description: This was filmed in Amsterdam 🥵🫦 back in May of last year. Why are the Dutch like this? I’m gonna be honest with you, 👄🐐 Amsterdamn is one of my most favourite cities but they were my least favourite crowds but I learned that Dutch people are just very str
item.author: morganjay

item.title: LOS ANGELES. Second show added. Tickets on sale in 1 hours (10am) no code needed just get your tickets! Shout out to @livenation Directed and edited by @filmopino Starting @Masih Nooristani and @Tofer See you at the show!!
item.description: LOS ANGELES. Second show added. Tickets on sale in 1 hours (10am) no code needed just get your tickets! Shout out to @livenation Directed and edited by @filmopino Starting @Masih Nooristani and @Tofer See you at the show!!
item.author: morganjay

item.title: New Vlog out! This is from our travels during our European tour last year. This was in Edinburgh Scotland one of my favourite cities in the world. A lot of you are in my DMS in my messages right now about why haven’t you come to Europe or any of these cit
item.description: New Vlog out! This is from our travels during our European tour last year. This was in Edinburgh Scotland one of my favourite cities in the world. A lot of you are in my DMS in my messages right now about why haven’t you come to Europe or any of these cit
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Once you Pop, you can’t stop. Didn’t choose could be seggsy. Shout out to this random fine shyt for letting me feed her @@Pringlesand shout out to the audience in Amsterdam for bringing good vibes at this show. Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morg
item.description: Once you Pop, you can’t stop. Didn’t choose could be seggsy. Shout out to this random fine shyt for letting me feed her @@Pringlesand shout out to the audience in Amsterdam for bringing good vibes at this show. Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morg
item.author: morganjay

item.title: LOS ANGELES. Little over a thousand tickets left for my show - or I should say my SECOND show at the Greek theater!!! I can’t believe how fast these shows have sold with the show being a little lest than 7 months always. WTH!!!!!
item.description: LOS ANGELES. Little over a thousand tickets left for my show - or I should say my SECOND show at the Greek theater!!! I can’t believe how fast these shows have sold with the show being a little lest than 7 months always. WTH!!!!!
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Masih poked me in the face. This man is blind. We are in Norway. So many things are going on! Second show in LA almost sold out. Once more set of announcements coming up! Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morganjay dot com Live streams at YouTube/@m
item.description: Masih poked me in the face. This man is blind. We are in Norway. So many things are going on! Second show in LA almost sold out. Once more set of announcements coming up! Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morganjay dot com Live streams at YouTube/@m
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Filmed in Amsterdam. Am I crazy or was she really giving me the eye. Shout out to Nikita from Amsterdam for bringing the seggsiest of vibez. Sadly I never saw her again :( Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morganjay dot com Live streams at YouTube/@
item.description: Filmed in Amsterdam. Am I crazy or was she really giving me the eye. Shout out to Nikita from Amsterdam for bringing the seggsiest of vibez. Sadly I never saw her again :( Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morganjay dot com Live streams at YouTube/@
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Norway was my rowdy crowd last year. People were trying to get me to do shots of Yeager Meister. The truth is whenever I perform or whenever I’m on tour I don’t drink or smoke because of how much I have to make sure my voice is in shape for my Shows Peopl
item.description: Norway was my rowdy crowd last year. People were trying to get me to do shots of Yeager Meister. The truth is whenever I perform or whenever I’m on tour I don’t drink or smoke because of how much I have to make sure my voice is in shape for my Shows Peopl
item.author: morganjay

item.title: When your cameraman falls and you have to improvise and grab somebody from the crowd to help you. This is what happened in Amsterdam at the 👄🐐 Amsterdamn theatre. Shout out to everybody who came out. Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morganjay dot co
item.description: When your cameraman falls and you have to improvise and grab somebody from the crowd to help you. This is what happened in Amsterdam at the 👄🐐 Amsterdamn theatre. Shout out to everybody who came out. Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morganjay dot co
item.author: morganjay

item.title: YORDAN. Are you from this planet? Why are you sus? Lowkey I love when people come out their shell. This was filmed in Toronto in DC last year. Still some meat on the bone and I gotta make it back. Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morganjay dot com
item.description: YORDAN. Are you from this planet? Why are you sus? Lowkey I love when people come out their shell. This was filmed in Toronto in DC last year. Still some meat on the bone and I gotta make it back. Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets at Morganjay dot com
item.author: morganjay

item.title: The crowds in 👄🐐 Amsterdamn were a bit tougher than I anticipated. It was really hard to get so many people out of their shell. But eventually we found gold thanks to everyone who came out if you’ve been asking me to come to Europe you’ll have to wait a l
item.description: The crowds in 👄🐐 Amsterdamn were a bit tougher than I anticipated. It was really hard to get so many people out of their shell. But eventually we found gold thanks to everyone who came out if you’ve been asking me to come to Europe you’ll have to wait a l
item.author: morganjay

item.title: It’s always funny when situation ships come to my show because if you come to my show and you’re sitting in the front row or on the edges, then you know there’s probably a high likelihood of you getting chosen right? Anyway, this was filmed last year in S
item.description: It’s always funny when situation ships come to my show because if you come to my show and you’re sitting in the front row or on the edges, then you know there’s probably a high likelihood of you getting chosen right? Anyway, this was filmed last year in S
item.author: morganjay

item.title: This was filmed in Oslo Norway last year during my European tour. We saw a lot of places and did a lot of shows and I appreciate everybody who came out! Some shows are better than others and some shows were unforgettable either way. I can’t wait to get ba
item.description: This was filmed in Oslo Norway last year during my European tour. We saw a lot of places and did a lot of shows and I appreciate everybody who came out! Some shows are better than others and some shows were unforgettable either way. I can’t wait to get ba
item.author: morganjay

item.title: PSA my show is RATED R. If you are bringing your kids to the show be warned. What you see on my channel is only a small fraction of the show. We cover mostly adult topics. See you tomorrow Houston.
item.description: PSA my show is RATED R. If you are bringing your kids to the show be warned. What you see on my channel is only a small fraction of the show. We cover mostly adult topics. See you tomorrow Houston.
item.author: morganjay

item.title: First day of the tour today, 6200 people in Houston. Posting this so y’all remember how to act right I can’t believe I’m doing a show this big, how did we get here? Life is a movie! Come through come correct no silly busineSs only goofy. 3/6 - Houston, T
item.description: First day of the tour today, 6200 people in Houston. Posting this so y’all remember how to act right I can’t believe I’m doing a show this big, how did we get here? Life is a movie! Come through come correct no silly busineSs only goofy. 3/6 - Houston, T
item.author: morganjay

item.title: LONDON VLOG KS OUT NOW!!!! Go watch on my channel!!!
item.description: LONDON VLOG KS OUT NOW!!!! Go watch on my channel!!!
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Filmed in Tampa Florida. This was an interesting couple but in the end everything worked out. I really loved this theater and tbh I almost wasn’t able to make the show cause at the time k had Niro virus. Anyway one more show tonight in New Orleans and the
item.description: Filmed in Tampa Florida. This was an interesting couple but in the end everything worked out. I really loved this theater and tbh I almost wasn’t able to make the show cause at the time k had Niro virus. Anyway one more show tonight in New Orleans and the
item.author: morganjay

item.title: This is filmed in City last year. This was a very fun show, at that time one of the biggest shows I’ve ever done so I appreciate everybody who came out! Did a lot of cool things since then that I’m excited to show you so definitely check out my other chan
item.description: This is filmed in City last year. This was a very fun show, at that time one of the biggest shows I’ve ever done so I appreciate everybody who came out! Did a lot of cool things since then that I’m excited to show you so definitely check out my other chan
item.author: morganjay

item.title: hawaii, ill see you this year. Not much else to say. This is a tour date I was really bothering my team to get on the calendar. Very excited to see you again. Mahalo. Shows are sept 25 and sep 26. Presale starts Wednesday 10am local General on-sale sta
item.description: hawaii, ill see you this year. Not much else to say. This is a tour date I was really bothering my team to get on the calendar. Very excited to see you again. Mahalo. Shows are sept 25 and sep 26. Presale starts Wednesday 10am local General on-sale sta
item.author: morganjay

item.title: This was filmed in Kansas City. I’m starting to release Clips from the talking dirty segment on my shell and eventually I’ll have long compilations of those but at the time when I did this show, this is one of the biggest venues i had ever done. Merch at
item.description: This was filmed in Kansas City. I’m starting to release Clips from the talking dirty segment on my shell and eventually I’ll have long compilations of those but at the time when I did this show, this is one of the biggest venues i had ever done. Merch at
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Hope we don’t get in trouble for this one. Shout out to this couple. Just to reiterate he did not write any of this. This was a a suggestion from the audience. This was filmed in Toronto last year around this same time. Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets
item.description: Hope we don’t get in trouble for this one. Shout out to this couple. Just to reiterate he did not write any of this. This was a a suggestion from the audience. This was filmed in Toronto last year around this same time. Merch at goofygang dot com Tickets
item.author: morganjay

item.title: This was filmed in Scotland last year. still looking for my dad. Life is funny. 3/12 - Tacoma, WA 3/13 - Seattle 3/14 - Vancouver, BC 3/26 - Pittsburgh, PA 3/27 - Salamanca, NY 3/28 - Rochester, NY 4/3 - Boise, ID 4/4 - Eugene, OR 4/10 - Charlotte, NC
item.description: This was filmed in Scotland last year. still looking for my dad. Life is funny. 3/12 - Tacoma, WA 3/13 - Seattle 3/14 - Vancouver, BC 3/26 - Pittsburgh, PA 3/27 - Salamanca, NY 3/28 - Rochester, NY 4/3 - Boise, ID 4/4 - Eugene, OR 4/10 - Charlotte, NC
item.author: morganjay

item.title: This was filmed in Orlando. This was the first show back on Valentine’s Day last year. I had to cancel the show right after because I think I had norovirus I barely made it through that show but shout out to the crowd that came out. Merch at goofygang dot
item.description: This was filmed in Orlando. This was the first show back on Valentine’s Day last year. I had to cancel the show right after because I think I had norovirus I barely made it through that show but shout out to the crowd that came out. Merch at goofygang dot
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Here’s some more crowd work TikTok Comedy slop to help you through the end times and the burning of the world. In the meantime, I’m gonna keep selling tickets and spreading a lot of fun and happiness! 3/12 - Tacoma, WA 3/13 - Seattle 3/14 - Vancouver, BC
item.description: Here’s some more crowd work TikTok Comedy slop to help you through the end times and the burning of the world. In the meantime, I’m gonna keep selling tickets and spreading a lot of fun and happiness! 3/12 - Tacoma, WA 3/13 - Seattle 3/14 - Vancouver, BC
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Tickets are officially available for everybody. Make sure you go to MY WABSYTE - do not google my name and your city. You will get scammed. If you’re city is not listed it’s because I was already there been there within the last 12-18months and you found
item.description: Tickets are officially available for everybody. Make sure you go to MY WABSYTE - do not google my name and your city. You will get scammed. If you’re city is not listed it’s because I was already there been there within the last 12-18months and you found
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Last year I shot six shows in three different cities with a lot of cameras. Part one is up and you couldn’t find the link in my profile. It’s only 17 minutes long. I would love if you watched it. other than that is a business as usual. Tour dates below
item.description: Last year I shot six shows in three different cities with a lot of cameras. Part one is up and you couldn’t find the link in my profile. It’s only 17 minutes long. I would love if you watched it. other than that is a business as usual. Tour dates below
item.author: morganjay

item.title: FINALLY THE TIME HAS COME TO THE SOUTHERN HEMISPHERE. And to places I’ve never been before. To continue the world tour. To meet new people and make new friends. Pre sale is Wednesday - only for mailing list. General sale is friday - for everyone! Octobe
item.description: FINALLY THE TIME HAS COME TO THE SOUTHERN HEMISPHERE. And to places I’ve never been before. To continue the world tour. To meet new people and make new friends. Pre sale is Wednesday - only for mailing list. General sale is friday - for everyone! Octobe
item.author: morganjay
